response.label: Foreign trade in agri-food products by month, product group, country, variable and flow
response.source: Natural Resources Institute Finland, Foreign trade in agri-food products, Finnish Customs
note:
Statistics on the trade published monthly are preliminary. The preliminary figures may change retrospectively as Customs' basic data is supplemented, until the final figures of the statistical year are published in September of the following year.
Source: Foreign trade statistics of finnish customs
